sql.query: SELECT id,locationId,spaceName,spaceType,defaultCapacity,isActive FROM tbl_spaces WHERE id=:id AND locationId=:locationId AND tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1

UPDATE tbl_spaces s INNER JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=s.locationId AND l.tenantId=s.tenantId SET s.spaceName=:spaceName,s.spaceType=NULLIF(:spaceType,''),s.description=NULLIF(:description,''),s.defaultCapacity=NULLIF(:defaultCapacity,''),s.isActive=:isActive,s.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE s.id=:id AND s.locationId=:locationId AND s.tenantId=:tenantId

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,beforeJson,afterJson,createdDate) VALUES (:tenantId,:userId,'space',:entityId,'space.updated',CONCAT(:actor,' updated space ',:spaceName),JSON_OBJECT('locationId',:locationId,'spaceName',:oldName,'spaceType',:oldType,'defaultCapacity',:oldCapacity,'isActive',:oldActive),JSON_OBJECT('locationId',:locationId2,'spaceName',:newName,'spaceType',:newType,'defaultCapacity',NULLIF(:newCapacity,''),'isActive',:newActive),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
